name_en: 🍒M 🍒 5BMIU MI New Chain Bag, top-grade imported lambskin, brand classic signature Matelasse embroidery. New design with detachable metal chain long shoulder strap, flip-top snap closure, one card slot inside, satin lining. Handbag or crossbody. Dimensions: 18 X9.5 X 4 cm. Comes with original packaging.
